role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on Portuguese vocabulary ('Auto Posto', 'Conveniencia') and abbreviations ('ROD.').
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain (flat plateau), soil color (red latosol), and vegetation type (savanna).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified Cerrado biome characteristics (scattered woody shrubs, oxidized soil).
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road markings (double yellow line), signage standards, and fuel types.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure details (utility poles, price board layout) to distinguish from other Portuguese-speaking regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Brazil. All agents adhered to their domains, providing strong, image-grounded evidence. The linguistic and regulatory agents provided the decisive evidence (Portuguese text, 'ROD.' abbreviation, fuel types) which the tournament correctly used to eliminate non-Portuguese speaking candidates and Portugal.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: All cited text ('AUTO POSTO', 'ROD. 267') is clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Red soil and flat terrain accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Vegetation description matches the Cerrado-like scrub visible.
